data.Modification: Cleavage product of EGS protein crosslinks by hydroylamine treatment/Addition of D
Representative mass and accurate mass for 116 & 117/mTRAQ medium
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Tris quenched monolink of BuUrBu crosslinker
Quaternary amine labeling reagent light form (N-term & K)
replacement of proton with ammonium ion

project.title: Enrichment of C3 Nitrate microorganisms
project.projectDescription: Microorganisms able to perform C3-driven nitrate reduction were enriched in a bioreactor
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The cell pellets were lysed in 5% sodium dodecyl sulfate (SDS), incubated with 20 mM dithiothreitol (final concentration) at 70 oC for 60 min and then cooled to room temperature, followed by alkylation with 40 mM iodoacetamide (final concentration) in the dark for 30 min. Afterwards, 1.2% phosphoric acid (final concentration) and six volumes of S-Trap binding buffer (90% methanol, 100 mM final concentration of ammonium bicarbonate, pH 7.1) were added. Total protein was digested in a S-Trap Micro Spin Column (ProtiFi, Huntington, USA) according to the manufacturer’s protocol.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw sequencing data were processed by searching against the annotated metagenomes.The identified proteins contained at least 1 unique peptide with a stringency cut-off of false discovery rate (FDR, q value) less than 0.05.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: Australian Centre for Water and Environmental Biotechnology (formerly AWMC),  University of Queensland
labPIs.name: Jianhua Guo

references.referenceLine: Wu M, Li J, Leu AO, Erler DV, Stark T, Tyson GW, Yuan Z, McIlroy SJ, Guo J. Anaerobic oxidation of propane coupled to nitrate reduction by a lineage within the class Symbiobacteriia. Nat Commun. 2022 13(1):6115

Characteristics[Specimen]: bioreactor seeded with biomass from a wastewater treatment facility

a mixture of approximately 100 mL of anaerobic digestion sludge and 50 mL of activated sludge from a full-scale wastewater treatment plant (Brisbane, Australia) was used as inoculum for the bioreactor enrichment.
Comment[Instrument]: Dionex Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano-LC system coupled to a Q-ExactiveTM H-X Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap™ mass spectrometer (Thermo ScientificTM)
